response.original_title: How Do I Dispute an Uphold Transaction? Full Support & Recovery Process
response.overview: How Do I Dispute an Uphold Transaction? Full Support & Recovery Process  To dispute a transaction, immediately contact🌐〔+1〕(888)〔574〕(7167) your card issuer via phone, app, or website, ideally within 60 days of the statement date.🌐〔+1〕(888)〔574〕(7167)  First, try contacting the merchant to resolve errors directly. If unresolved, file a formal dispute with your bank, providing evidence to receive a 🌐〔+1〕(888)〔574〕(7167) temporary credit during the investigation.  Step-by-Step Dispute Process  Review the Transaction: Identify the exact transaction, 🌐〔+1〕(888)〔574〕(7167) merchant name, date, and amount.  Contact the Merchant: Reach out to the seller first for issues🌐〔+1〕(888)〔574〕(7167)  like items not received, returned merchandise, or wrong amounts. They can often resolve issues faster than a bank.
